name: permission_presets_chat_footer
description: S5.S -- assert the chat-side permission preset dropdown is addressable. Footer-declutter pass moved the combo from the bottom footer to mode_row (above input) and retired the constant 'Permission:' static-text prefix (`kChatPresetChip`). The combo carries its tooltip + colour cue; this script just verifies the kChatPresetChoice widget renders.
